context.audience: Full-stack developers deploying to edge runtimes, teams optimizing latency for global audiences, developers building serverless applications on Cloudflare Workers or Deno Deploy
pain_points: Working within edge runtime limitations like no Node.js APIs and limited execution time
Database access from edge functions with connection pooling and latency
Debugging and testing edge functions locally before deployment
Managing cold starts and execution time limits for complex logic
Choosing between edge platforms and understanding their trade-offs
